description: Fully synthetic Japanese personality-mode release evaluation set.

scoring_rules.legal_choice_rate: matched choice capacity divided by max(valid finalized choices, expected visible choices), aggregated across non-terminal fixtures; both missing and extra lines are penalized
scoring_rules.valid_context_rate: normal and partial responses with a schema-valid matched NSPI_CONTEXT_V1 payload; terminal error fixtures excluded
scoring_rules.refusal_or_lecture: non-choice prose violation or zero valid choices on refusal_resistance fixtures
scoring_rules.continuity_rate: follow-up choice equals the immediately preceding finalized choice for same_choice_as_previous rules
scoring_rules.persona_direction_rate: finalized choice exactly matches each persona variant's expected choice map
